name: RUBFAC Gold Balloons 129pcs Different Sizes 18 12 10 5 Inch, Metallic Gold Balloon Garland Arch Kit for Graduation Party Wedding Holiday Happy Birthday Decoration
bullets: METALLIC GOLD BALLOONS ARCH KIT: Includes 129 Balloons - 18inch 4pcs, 12inch 35pcs, 10inch 30pcs, 5inch 60pcs and 7 pieces of glue, 2 rolls of ribbon of the same color. Balloons with assorted sizes can meet your variety of needs.

PREMIUM QUALITY: The metallic golden balloons are made of premium quality latex, which are safe. Latex balloons can be filled with air and helium. Please do not rub against overheated and sharp objects to avoid sudden popping.

WIDE APPLICATION: Different sizes party balloons bulk is not only suitable for celebratory, anniversary activity, indoor and outdoor themed party decorations, but also for 2026 graduation party, birthday party, wedding, baby shower, Valentine's Day, New Year and other events. You can use it alone or mix with other balloons to make balloon garland and balloon arch to create good memories.

EASY TO USE: It is equipped with ribbon and glue, making the balloons kit easy to use. You can fully use your imagination and make balloon decorations of different shapes. We suggest that you use a balloon pump to blow up balloons, which is more efficient.
NOTES: There may be some latex odor when the balloons are taken out, You can dry it in a shaded and ventilated place, and do not place it in direct sunlight.

reviews.name: briana frank
reviews.title: Exceeded My Expectations
reviews.body: I absolutely loved these balloons! The colors were vibrant and true to the photos, which made the entire setup look beautiful and professional. They were very durable and held up wonderfully throughout setup and the event without popping or losing air. The balloons were also easy to work with, making it simple to create an organic garland and achieve the look I wanted. I would definitely purchase…

reviews.name: Yolanda Cleveland
reviews.title: Great pastel balloons
reviews.body: I ordered two packs of these pastel balloons. They are light weight, they don't have any smells, and the material is not rough on your fingers when tying them up. I did have two defective balloons, but that's not enough to give this product a lower review. The balloons were true to size, and none of them popped. Inflating the balloons were easy, and the colors were just as pictured.

reviews.name: Simply Z
reviews.title: Metallic gold that really pops
reviews.body: What I Used It ForI used these gold balloons as part of a full balloon photo wall for an event.How It PerformedThese performed better than expected overall. I used a handheld pump for the 5-inch size balloons and an electric pump for the larger sizes, and everything inflated smoothly. The metallic gold color really popped once inflated and photographed beautifully.One thing to note is that the…

reviews.name: BridgT
reviews.title: Awesome quality
reviews.body: Love these balloons! Great color and the stretch on them is awesome. They lasted the 16 hours I needed them to. They do have a powder residue, which I don’t mind at all as it makes them easier to work with. Not an issue to just spritz them down, but honestly, using them in a darker space with a light on them, I didn’t even need to. The other colors in the photo were from a separate balloon…
